description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image and the docker:dind service. Define two stages: build and publish. Add a job named docker build in the build stage that runs only on the master branch and executes: docker login --username gitlab-ci-token --password "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY", docker build --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:$CI_COMMIT_SHA ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:$CI_COMMIT_SHA. Add a job named docker promote in the publish stage that also runs only on master and runs: docker login --username gitlab-ci-token --password "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY", docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:$CI_COMMIT_SHA, docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG:$CI_COMMIT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. The pipeline pushes images to the GitLab Container Registry.
